EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to upload file {object.name} to a datastore to path {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to move file or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to copy file or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to rename file or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
File {object.name} is uploaded to a datastore to path {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
File or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" is moved on host {event_src.host}
File or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" is copied on host {event_src.host}
Failed to download file {object.name} from a datastore from path {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
File or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" is renamed on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove file or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
File or directory {object.name} is removed from datastore "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
File {object.name} is downloaded from a datastore from path {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
